description: covid19-api.com provides a public API for COVID-19 statistics based on Johns Hopkins CSSE data, including country, region, province, and historical reports. The original covid19-api.com docs endpoint appears defunct, but the service is documented via an OpenAPI spec mirrored by APIs.guru and a live docs site at covid-api.com.
summary: Public COVID-19 data REST API with OpenAPI documentation; no GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI found.
